Mémoire des Territoires.voice_instructions: A mature, contemplative narrator with the depth and gravitas of a historical documentary voice. The voice should be reflective and evocative, with natural pauses to let the emotion resonate. The tone starts with wonder when describing the bustling shipyards of 1950, builds with pride when speaking of the France ocean liner, and concludes with melancholy as it reflects on what remains today. The voice should convey both the grandeur of the industrial past and the poignancy of its transformation.
